{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blood Sage’s tablet
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Blood Sage’s tablet]] states that the [[Blood Shadow]] can sometimes feed on its own.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
